signals.headline: BJP Releases Kerala Election Manifesto with Key Welfare Promises | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
BJP Releases Kerala Election Manifesto with Key Welfare Promises | NO | LOW confidence**

The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has released its manifesto for the upcoming Kerala legislative assembly elections, promising Rs 3,000 monthly pensions for needy women, widows, and seniors over 70, plus 20,000 liters of free water per household monthly, alongside infrastructure and temple-focused measures.[1]
